revision.comment: Creating a new game page for the indie arcade space shooter Galaxian Wars: Alien Shooter.
revision.text:
{{Game |Guid=f646aa68-e74b-427a-9080-b6ea7f04137f |Name=Galaxian Wars: Alien Shooter |Deck=A fast-paced, skill-based arcade space shooter heavily inspired by classic Galaxian-style games and running on a custom hybrid ZX Spectrum emulation engine. |ReleaseDateType=Full |ReleaseDate=2026-06-14 |Genres=Genres/Shoot Em Up |Platforms=Platforms/Android }} Galaxian Wars: Alien Shooter is a fast-paced, skill-based arcade space shooter inspired by classic Galaxian-style games and retro alien invaders. It features relentless waves of alien swarms in deterministic arcade combat where precision, reaction, and positioning are key. The game features no upgrades or grinding, focusing purely on skill, mastery, and survival with global leaderboard dominance in a brutal one-credit arcade experience.
== Gameplay ==
* Pure Arcade Shooter: Classic top-down gameplay with zero upgrades or progression systems. * 100% Deterministic Combat: Every action, hit, and mistake matters. No random elements, only player skill. * Fast & Replayable: Quick sessions designed specifically for mastery, reflex training, and skill improvement.
== Dynamic Swarm AI ==
* Coordinated Alien Swarms: Smart enemy formations controlled by flagship intelligence behavior. * Tactical Elimination: Destroy leaders to destabilize entire formations and cause chaos in enemy ranks. * Adaptive Flagships: Surviving enemy leaders adapt, escape, and return in later waves with increased aggression. * Berserk Phases: End-of-wave rage mechanics that dramatically increase pressure and intensity.
== Technical Specs & 8-Bit Retro Engine == The game is built on a custom hybrid engine combining modern host performance with hardware-accurate emulated ZX Spectrum subsystems:
* Hardware-Accurate Rendering: Authentic attribute clash simulation. * Voltage-Based Colors: True-to-hardware palette reproduction using voltage-level color emulation instead of basic RGB approximations. * Register-Level AY Audio: Pure chiptune soundscapes driven at the register level by an authentic AY-8910 audio chip emulation. * Fixed 50Hz Cycle: Perfect 20ms frame steps for authentic retro gameplay timing and speed.
== Competitive Challenge ==
* Global Leaderboards: Worldwide competition for high-scores. * Retro Name Entry: Authentic 3-letter arcade name entry system for high-score tables. * Hardcore Rules: One credit, one run, no continues, and no revives.

page.title: Games/Galaxy Fraulein Yuna Mika Akitaka Illust Works/Credits
Games/Game The Strongest Job Is Apparently Not a Hero or a Sage, but an Appraiser (Provisional)!: Dungeon and Mystery Girl

revision.comment: Created page with "{{Game |Guid=7953cceb-cbad-4625-b98d-5a7435dc77fc |Name=GAME The Strongest Job Is Apparently Not a Hero or a Sage, but an Appraiser (Provisional)!: Dungeon and Mystery Girl |Image=Cobvchgamethestrongestvert.webp |BackgroundImage=Ar5nadgamethestrongestjobbg.webp |Deck=A fast-paced arena shooter game with simple controls and strategic battles. Experience a story original to the game, starring the characters of Appraiser (Provisional). |ReleaseDateType=None |Publishers=Comp..."
